label: Configure starting pawns (mutants)
description: Configuration page for selecting starting pawns as specific mutant types. Requires the Anomaly DLC.

customSummary.label: Custom summary
customSummary.description: Optional override text shown in the scenario summary for this starting pawn configuration. Translated.

mutantCounts.label: Mutant counts
mutantCounts.description: List of mutant type and count pairs defining the mix of starting pawns by mutant type.
